title: Oru Rosa Lyrics Jeeva Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oru Rosa
Singer(s): Anthony Dasan, A.V.Pooja
Music: D.Imman
Movie: Jeeva (2014)

Oru rosa, unna loose-aa
aakki ponaale, ava lesaa.
Oru rosa, unna dhoosaa
oodhi ponaale, alagesaa.

Laandhar vilakku kullaaraa
maatti mulikkum eesaluthaan.
kaadhal neruppil vilundhaale
manasu mulukka theesaludhaan.

Oru rosa, unna loose-aa
aakki ponaale, ava lesaa.
Oru rosa, unna dhoosaa
oodhi ponaale, alagesaa.

califlower-um vaasana thookkum
kadhal kirukku munnaadi.
kaali idhayam azhugaya thaekkum
kaadhal kirukku pinnaadi.

Osara osara unna koottitu poi
parakka palakki vidum munnaadi.
Asara asara unna pottu adichi
sarakka palakkumey pinnaadi.

Chalkku piece-a chocolatetaattam
chappi kedandhaan annaikku.
Tape illaa casetta pottu
paattu kettan innaikku.

Maraththil avan compassa keeri
idhayam varanji vachaan annaikki.
Idiyil idiyil andha poomaram pooraa
karugi pochudaa innaikku.

Oru rosa, unna loose-aa
aakki ponaale, ava lesaa.
Oru rosa, unna dhoosaa
oodhi ponaale, alagesaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oru Rosa'?

'Oru Rosa' conveys the playful and romantic feelings associated with love, using vibrant imagery and catchy phrases.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Jeeva'?

The song is a light-hearted romantic number that showcases the chemistry between the lead characters, enhancing the film's overall theme of love.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Oru Rosa'?

The song is sung by Anthonydasan and AV Pooja, with music composed by D Imman.

When was 'Oru Rosa' released?

'Oru Rosa' was released on September 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Oru Rosa', the playful banter between the singers beautifully encapsulates the joy and excitement of young love. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics make it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions, such as weddings and parties. As the characters express their feelings, the vibrant music composed by D Imman adds to the overall romantic atmosphere. This delightful duet is sure to evoke happiness and nostalgia in listeners, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Rosa from the movie Jeeva is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love with its catchy beats and playful lyrics. Featuring the unique collaboration of Anthonydasan and AV Pooja, this song is sure to uplift your spirits and make your heart dance. Dive into the vibrant world of Jeeva and let the melody sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: One rose, if you make it loose, it becomes beautiful. One rose, if you throw it away, it becomes lovely.
The light of the lamp is changed and it burns brightly. When love is in flames, the heart gets burned.
One rose, if you make it loose, it becomes beautiful. One rose, if you throw it away, it becomes lovely.
Before the love's excitement, the cauliflower's fragrance rises. After the love's excitement, the black heart cries.
Before the excitement, it carries you away and puts you in a palanquin. After the excitement, it hits you and puts you in a palanquin.
You are the mirror that reflects light.
Yesterday, a piece of chalk turned into chocolate. Today, without tape, I put on a cassette and listened to a song.
Yesterday, he made the compass in the tree and the heart was broken. Today, the flower in the heart has wilted away.
At the end, it has come for itself.
One rose, if you make it loose, it becomes beautiful. One rose, if you throw it away, it becomes lovely.
